completed_tasks.name: P1 — impact field injection callers
completed_tasks.detail: _all_callers_from_rg in repository_ir.py now normalizes injects-edge FQNs (pkg.Class.field → pkg.Class) via _normalize_owner_fqn. Fixes @Autowired/@Inject/@Resource in compute_blast_radius BFS. spring_impact.py was already correct.

completed_tasks.name: P2 — M3FiltroSeguridad/saint-server contamination removal
completed_tasks.detail: Purged from 8 source files: detectors/java.py, repository_ir.py, semantic_analyzer.py, serializer.py, canonical_ir.py, prepare_context.py, mcp/server.py, cli.py. Registries now empty extension points. serializer uses generic resource= pattern.

completed_tasks.name: P4 — cache status CWD-dependent
completed_tasks.detail: _resolve_repo_root helper walks .git ancestry; all cache status/clear/warm commands now auto-resolve to git root from any subdirectory.

completed_tasks.name: P5 — cold-start --output flag missing
completed_tasks.detail: Added --output/-o option to cold-start command, matching other commands pattern.

completed_tasks.name: P8 — UX errors pr-impact and fix-bug
completed_tasks.detail: pr-impact --files error now explains expected file format with git diff example. fix-bug detects symptom-as-path misuse and emits structured error with --symptom suggestion.

remaining_tasks.name: P3 — cache Windows slow (cold ~8s, warm ~4s)
remaining_tasks.note: Not reproducible on macOS (0.18s warm). Windows-specific: Path.replace() on locked files may fail silently → CAS blobs: 0 → no deduplication → slower. Investigate _atomic_write with try/except fallback for Windows PermissionError.

remaining_tasks.name: P6 — transactional count inconsistency (compact=33 vs spring-audit=178)
remaining_tasks.note: compact counts classes; spring-audit counts annotations. Investigate and unify semantics or add clear labels.

remaining_tasks.name: P7 — project_summary contaminated by doc text (e.g. Trivy output)
remaining_tasks.note: summarizer.py likely scores doc files too highly. Prioritize structure/code/deps/config over free-text docs.

remaining_tasks.name: P9 — repo-ir 71MB without warning
remaining_tasks.note: Add size warning + --gzip / streaming option for large repo-ir outputs.

blockers.description: P3 Windows cache requires Windows environment to reproduce and validate
blockers.workaround: Can inspect _atomic_write statically for Windows PermissionError patterns

decisions.rationale: Avoids changing serialized IR format; spring_impact.py already normalizes at its own BFS layer — two-layer approach is correct
Remove M3FiltroSeguridad; leave extensible registries for future project-specific annotations

decisions.decision: Added _resolve_repo_root helper to all 3 cache subcommands
decisions.rationale: DRY; consistent behaviour across status/clear/warm; walks .git not just checks for it

next_action: Start P3: inspect _atomic_write for Windows Path.replace() failure mode, then P6: run compact and spring-audit on same Spring project to compare transaction counts
context_notes: Session 85. All changes committed at a17dcac as v1.35.30. Tests: 8 pre-existing Pro-license failures (delta/generate_tests), 0 new failures. Validated: P1 on @Autowired/@Inject/@Resource/same-pkg; P2 on keycloak @Inject callers; P4 from petclinic/src subdirectory; P5 --help shows --output; P8 pr-impact and fix-bug manual check.
